name: Sweet & Savory Rice Pilaf -NHB
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup whole almonds, toasted and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine water, bouillon cubes, and soy sauce.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Stir in rice and dried fruit.
4. Cover immediately and remove from heat; let stand for 5 minutes, uncovered.
5. Fluff with a fork.
6. Stir in almonds and honey.
[Makes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 397 Sodium: 1100 mg Carbohydrates: 72.1 g Protein: 8.67 g Cholesterol: 0.31 mg Dietary Fiber: 3.82 g Total Fat: 9.6 g Cal. from Fat: 21%]
